svg.text: ① Composed + custom — telco1 deploys service1 and builds bespoke network-ops agents with agent1, all operated by run1.
② Reliable at carrier scale — run1 runs it 24/7 with incident-grade SLAs; assure1 certifies before go-live.
③ Human acts on the network — agents diagnose & recommend; engineers make every network change.
④ Grounded & protected — answers tie to account & network state; fraud / SIM-swap flagged, never auto-acted.
⑤ Compliant & private — TRAI / DoT alignment, India DPDP, CDR & subscriber data tightly controlled.
⑥ Outcome-led — cost-to-serve, CSAT, MTTR, churn & leakage, measured — delivered via the elan1 method.
